contract_claim: Header comment says 'Skipped on Windows (automatic cleanup) and in CI environments.' but the code at L148-155 shows it is also skipped on non-CI Windows. The phrase 'automatic cleanup' is undocumented and may mislead — the script simply does nothing on Windows, not because Windows cleans up automatically.
